title: Quarterly bus fares statistics: January to March 2025
body: " Our statistical practice is regulated by the Office for Statistics Regulation (OSR). OSR sets the standards of trustworthiness, quality and value in the Code of Practice for Statistics that all producers of official statistics should adhere to. You are welcome to contact us directly by emailing us with any comments about how we meet these standards.   Statistics on local bus fares in Great Britain  The local bus fares index increased by 14.3% in England outside London between March 2024 and March 2025. This period covers the introduction of the £3 fare cap in England from 1 January 2025, which has led to more change than previous quarters.  For other areas, the local bus fares index change between March 2024 and March 2025 was:   0.0% increase in London 9.6% increase in metropolitan areas 17.3% increase in non-metropolitan areas 4.9% increase in Scotland 13.5% increase in Wales   The Consumer Price Index (CPI) increased by 2.6% over the same 12-month period.  Contact us  Bus statistics     Email bus.statistics@dft.gov.uk     Media enquiries 0300 7777 878       To hear more about DfT statistical publications as they are released, follow us on X at DfTstats. "
